denominator.notes: seed=/mnt/d/extra consultoria/Extra - alvos de licitação. R-0.xlsx; sha256=d65f272812cf…; included=1093

source_mapping_coverage.label: Source mapping coverage
source_mapping_coverage.formula: entities with explicit source registry record (including status=source_not_identified) / denominator

operational_source_coverage.label: Operational source coverage
operational_source_coverage.formula: entities with ≥1 official source: mapped + accessible + collected + normalized + reconciled + verified within SLA + recent evidence / denominator
limitations: Operational = verified/operational with seven stages true, per-source SLA, run/raw/hash/normalized/reconciliation provenance. accessible_only_excluded=0; dry_run_rejected=16; registry_rows=1093. Mapped/accessible ≠ §3.2 pipeline.

freshness_coverage.label: Freshness coverage
freshness_coverage.formula: entities verified within applicable SLA / denominator
freshness_coverage.reason: freshness_manifest.json is source-level, not entity-level. Entity freshness requires entity_coverage.last_seen_at or coverage_evidence.observed_at.
limitations: session freshness_manifest at /mnt/d/extra consultoria/docs/ops/session-2026-07-17; not entity-level SLA rollup

opportunity_recall.label: Opportunity recall
opportunity_recall.formula: true positives in stratified benchmark sample / sample positives
opportunity_recall.reason: Recall sample is incomplete: unlabeled=0, captured_without_evidence=0, missing_strata=['autarquia', 'camara', 'fundacao', 'platform_pncp', 'platform_sc_compras', 'source_html', 'source_js']

required_field_completeness.label: Required field completeness
required_field_completeness.formula: mean over opportunities of (present decision fields / 17 decision fields); absence is explicit

commercial_opportunity_any.label: Legacy alias for entities_with_recent_commercial_signal (NOT coverage)
commercial_opportunity_any.notes: Backward compatibility only. Do not call this coverage.

notes: Commercial signal metric is NOT labeled coverage.
Denominator is never reduced to improve percentages.
Denominator notes: seed=/mnt/d/extra consultoria/Extra - alvos de licitação. R-0.xlsx; sha256=d65f272812cf…; included=1093

metrics.name: commercial_opportunity_any
metrics.note: SINAL COMERCIAL — NÃO é cobertura operacional 100% DoD.

metrics.name: entity_coverage_db_is_covered
metrics.formula: COUNT DISTINCT entity_id WHERE is_covered on raio_200km / 1093

metrics.name: session_matched_any_procurement
metrics.formula: entities matched from session artifacts with procurement evidence / 1093

metrics.name: with_document_url
metrics.formula: covered entities that have at least one source URL / 1093
